item.title: RORA Coach Midnight on facing TLPH early in MSC at EWC 2026: "Fortunate and unfortunate at the same time."
item.description: RORA Coach Midnight talks about the Rafaela pick and how facing TLPH early in the MSC at EWC 2026 was both "fortunate and unfortunate."

item.title: It’s time for soundproof booths to return to esports
item.description: After a Call of Duty Grand Final was heavily influenced by crowd behavior, we need to bring back soundproof booths in esports.

item.title: "Keep fighting for your dream": Team Vitality MLBB pro Vivian on overcoming challenges and judgement to become a top esports pro
item.description: Team Vitality Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) player Vivi "Vivian" Indrawaty changed her life and her family's by banking on her esports career.

item.title: MSC 2026 Esports World Cup: Format, schedule, results, and more
item.description: Here is a complete guide to MSC 2026 at the Esports World Cup, including match results, schedules, and key information.

item.title: PlayVS takes esports to 50,000 Scouts at the 2026 National Jamboree
item.description: PlayVS is rolling out a dedicated gaming arena at Scouting America's biggest youth gathering, running July 22–31 in West Virginia — part of a broader push to plant esports in unexpected spaces.

item.title: All Fortnite Season start and end dates
item.description: Here is a list of every start and end date for all of Fortnite's chapters and seasons.

item.title: Hans Jagnow on Paris, politics, and building fandom across 24 games at the Esports World Cup
item.description: Esports Foundation's Hans Jagnow talks about the Esports World Cup's relocation, the changing perception of esports, and esports fandom.

item.title: Street Fighter 6 LCQ at the EWC 2026: Tough matches to enter the biggest stage
item.description: Track the LCQ action for Street Fighter 6 EWC 2026 here! Watch the stream, check out the top participants, and discover characters in play.

item.title: Old-school Masteries are back in League Classic!
item.description: The Offense, Defense, and Utility Mastery Trees are back! Here's everything you need to know about Masteries in League Classic.

item.title: Risk without reward: Counter-Strike 2's new sticker system threatens the entire esports scene's structure
item.description: Valve just made some big changes to the sticker system, causing Counter-Strike 2 teams to lose a ton of revenue. This could spell trouble.

item.title: FLCN Hadji ecstatic to be back in the international stage in MSC at EWC 2026: "I really miss this feeling."
item.description: Hadji shares his excitement as he returns to the international stage. Here are his thoughts on the MSC at EWC 2026.

item.title: Forget the burrito bowl: Karmine Corp's Blue Rising TCG is the future of esports monetization
item.description: Sick of the boring slapped on logos and lazy sponsored social media posts? Karmine Corp is showing how esports can truly thrive.

item.title: Lich Queen Mei rises in new Overwatch x World of Warcraft collaboration!
item.description: The legendary Lich Queen Mei skin and Frostmourne Ana weapon have entered Overwatch as part of the game's latest World of Warcraft crossover.

item.title: Faker named Youth Cyber Gambling Awareness Ambassador by Korean National Police Agency
item.description: Faker will front a nationwide campaign in South Korea, encouraging young people struggling with cyber gambling to seek help.

item.title: Single-player games deserve more attention in esports
item.description: League of Legends and Counter-Strike 2 seem to get all the love, but single-player games deserve way more attention.

item.title: I am not convinced that hunting for AI is going to solve esports' biggest issues
item.description: With Mobile Legends: Bang Bang recently accused of having AI in its menu, I got to thinking: Who cares really? Is it impacting esports?

item.title: Top Stories Archives - Esports Insider
item.description: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.

item.title: Latest News Archives - Esports Insider
item.description: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.

item.title: Games Archives - Esports Insider
item.description: A newly-added rule states that what you say to your own teammates is no longer off-limits to TOs. Will this stop trash talking?

item.title: News Archives
item.description: RORA Coach Midnight talks about the Rafaela pick and how facing TLPH early in the MSC at EWC 2026 was both "fortunate and unfortunate."
